scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @mertushka/trpc-webrtc-link && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:types && npm run test:package
scripts.check:package: npm run build --workspace @mertushka/trpc-webrtc-link && publint packages/trpc-webrtc-link --strict && attw --pack packages/trpc-webrtc-link --profile node16 --no-emoji
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run check:package && npm run build && npm audit --audit-level=high
